title: EN 1995-1-1 Timber Connection Design
description: Timber Connection Design according to EN 1995-1-1:2004 + A1 :2008 (E)

Conn_type.description: Connection Type. Symbol: \text{Connection type}. Select the type of timber to timber connection to design.

alfa_1.description: Angle (α). Symbol: α. Units: °. Angle between Member 1 and Member 2.

Timber_type_M1.description: Timber Type. Symbol: \text{Timber type}. Timber species family for Member 1 (affects material properties and design values).

Service_Class_M1.description: Service Class. Symbol: \text{Service class}. Service class per EN 1995 determining moisture and load duration effects on timber properties.

Material_input_M1.description: Material Properties. Symbol: \text{Material input}. Select whether to use standard material properties according to EN 338 / EN 14374 or to input manually.

Timber_grade_M1.description: Timber Grade. Symbol: \text{Timber grade}. Design timber grade (EN 338) used to select characteristic strengths for Member 1.

ρ_1.description: ρk,1. Symbol: ρ_{k,1}. Units: kg/m³. Characteristic density of timber.

fc90k1.description: fc,90,k,1. Symbol: f_{c,90,k,1}. Units: N/mm². Characteristic compressive strength perpendicular to grain of timber.

gamma_M1.description: γM1. Symbol: γ_{M1}. Partial safety factor.

t1.description: Width (t1). Symbol: t_{1}. Units: mm. Width of the section.

h1.description: Height (h1). Symbol: h_{1}. Units: mm. Height of the section.

Timber_type_M2.description: Timber Type. Symbol: \text{Timber type}. Timber species family for Member 2 (affects material properties and design values).

Service_Class_M2.description: Service Class. Symbol: \text{Service class}. Service class per EN 1995 determining moisture and load duration effects on timber properties.

Material_input_M2.description: Material Properties. Symbol: \text{Material input}. Select whether to use standard material properties according to EN 338 / EN 14374 or to input manually.

Timber_grade_M2.description: Timber Grade. Symbol: \text{Timber grade}. Design timber grade (EN 338) used to select characteristic strengths for Member 2.

ρ_2.description: ρk,2. Symbol: ρ_{k,2}. Units: kg/m³. Characteristic density of timber.

fc90k2.description: fc,90,k,2. Symbol: f_{c,90,k,2}. Units: N/mm². Characteristic compressive strength perpendicular to grain of timber.

gamma_M2.description: γM2. Symbol: γ_{M2}. Partial safety factor.

t2.description: Width (t2). Symbol: t_{2}. Units: mm. Width of the section.

h2.description: Height (h2). Symbol: h_{2}. Units: mm. Height of the section.

Metal_material_2.description: Metal plate material. Steel grade of any metal plate used in the connection for Member 2 (used when metal plate is present).

Fastener_type_1.description: Fastener Type. Symbol: \text{Fastener Type}. Type of fastener used in the connection.

Nail_shape.description: Nail Shape. Symbol: \text{Nail shape}. Cross-sectional shape of the nail (round or square) which affects load capacity and behaviour.

Hole.description: Hole Pre-Drilled?. Symbol: \text{Nail hole}. Indicates whether the fastener hole is pre-drilled (affects installation and capacity).

Nail_finish.description: Nail Finish. Symbol: \text{Nail finish}. Finish/type of nail (smooth or ring shank) affecting withdrawal strength and splitting risk.

Split_sensitivity.description: Timber Split Sensitivity. Symbol: \text{Timber Split Sensitivity}. Species like spruce and pine are more sensitive.

Penetration_side.description: Penetration side. Symbol: \text{Penetration side}. Which member the fastener penetrates into (orientation used for design).

Penetration_side_TT2.description: Penetration Side. Symbol: \text{Penetration side}. For double shear connections, choose single or double side penetration (overlapping fasteners).

d_n.description: Nail Diameter (d). Symbol: d. Units: mm. Diameter of nail.

d_s1.description: Screw Smooth Shank Diameter (d). Symbol: d. Units: mm. Screw smooth shank diameter.

d_s2.description: Screw Smooth Shank Diameter (d). Symbol: d. Units: mm. Screw smooth shank diameter.

d_nl.description: Nail Diameter (d). Symbol: d. Units: mm. Nail diameter/side dimension.

d_1.description: Screw Thread Root Diameter (d1). Symbol: d_{1}. Units: mm. Screw thread root diameter.

l_s.description: Screw Length (ls). Symbol: l_{s}. Units: mm. Length of screw.

l_t.description: Screw Thread Length (lt). Symbol: l_{t}. Units: mm. Length of screw thread.

d_b.description: Bolt Diameter (d). Symbol: d. Units: mm. Nominal diameter of bolt.

d_nh.description: Nail Head Diameter (dnh). Symbol: d_{nh}. Units: mm. Nail head diameter.

d_sh.description: Screw Head Diameter (dsh). Symbol: d_{sh}. Units: mm. Screw head diameter.

l_n.description: Nail Length (ln). Symbol: l_{n}. Units: mm. Length of nail.

fu_b.description: Tensile Strength (fb). Symbol: f_{b}. Units: N/mm². Tensile strength of fastener (wire strength for nails or characteristic tensile strength for bolts and screws).

d_bw.description: Washer Diameter (dbwM). Symbol: d_{bw}. Units: mm. Diameter of washer.

m.description: m. Units: No.. Number of fastener rows in Member 1 (blue lines).

dy.description: Δy. Units: mm. Distance between fastener rows in Member 1.

n.description: n. Units: No.. Number of fastener rows in Member 2 (green lines).

dx.description: Δx. Units: mm. Distance between fastener rows in Member 2.

load_duration.description: Load Duration. Symbol: \text{Load duration}. Load duration class per EN 1995; affects strength through modification factors.

F.description: FvEd. Symbol: F_{vEd}. Units: kN. Axial force in Member 2.

Fv1.description: Fv,Ed1. Symbol: F_{v,Ed1}. Units: kN. Shear force in the left part of the joint (sum of the shear forces in the joint should be in equilibrium with the vertical component of force F).

Fv2.description: Fv,Ed2. Symbol: F_{v,Ed2}. Units: kN. Shear force in the right part of the joint (sum of the shear forces in the joint should be in equilibrium with the vertical component of force F).

show_dimensions.description: Show Dimensions. Symbol: \text{Show dimensions}. Toggle to show or hide dimensions in the geometry view.

sc_d.description: Dimension Size. Symbol:  \text{Dimension scale}. Dimension scale for better visibility of dimensions in the geometry view.

zoom_factor.description: Zoom Level. Symbol: \text{Zoom Level}. Zoom level for the geometry view (1 = 100%).

mover.description: Horizontal Position. Symbol: \text{Horizontal Position}. Mover for adjusting the position of the geometry in the geometry view.

report.description: Report Detail. Symbol: \text{Report}. Choose level of detail to include in the generated report.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
